title: tf.pad  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Pads a tensor.
This operation pads atensoraccording to thepaddingsyou specify.paddingsis an integer tensor with shape[n, 2], where n is the rank oftensor. For each dimension D ofinput,paddings[D, 0]indicates how
many values to add before the contents oftensorin that dimension, andpaddings[D, 1]indicates how many values to add after the contents oftensorin that dimension. Ifmodeis "REFLECT" then bothpaddings[D, 0]andpaddings[D, 1]must be no greater thantensor.dim_size(D) - 1. Ifmodeis "SYMMETRIC" then bothpaddings[D, 0]andpaddings[D, 1]must be
no greater thantensor.dim_size(D).
The padded size of each dimension D of the output is:
